title: Roles, Contrast, and Movement Combinations
description: Practice two phrases expressing roles, contrast, limits, movement, or absence.

questions.sentence: ___ the rain, we walked ___ the station.
questions.completedSentence: despite the rain, we walked toward the station.
questions.japanese: 雨にもかかわらず、駅の方へ歩いた。

questions.sentence: She worked ___ a guide ___ the summer.
questions.completedSentence: She worked as a guide throughout the summer.
questions.japanese: 彼女は夏の間ずっとガイドとして働いた。

questions.sentence: Everyone ___ Ken entered ___ an ID card.
questions.completedSentence: Everyone except Ken entered without an ID card.
questions.japanese: ケン以外は全員、学生証なしで入った。

questions.sentence: The cat jumped ___ the chair ___ the floor.
questions.completedSentence: The cat jumped off the chair onto the floor.
questions.japanese: 猫は椅子から床へ飛び降りた。

questions.sentence: He completed the task ___ an hour ___ help.
questions.completedSentence: He completed the task within an hour without help.
questions.japanese: 彼は助けなしで1時間以内に課題を終えた。

questions.sentence: The cloud looked ___ a ship ___ the afternoon.
questions.completedSentence: The cloud looked like a ship throughout the afternoon.
questions.japanese: その雲は午後ずっと船のように見えた。

questions.sentence: We moved ___ the exit ___ the smoke.
questions.completedSentence: We moved toward the exit despite the smoke.
questions.japanese: 煙にもかかわらず出口の方へ進んだ。

questions.sentence: He spoke ___ team leader ___ his nervousness.
questions.completedSentence: He spoke as team leader despite his nervousness.
questions.japanese: 彼は緊張していたにもかかわらず、チームリーダーとして話した。

questions.sentence: The store stayed open ___ the storm ___ the power cuts.
questions.completedSentence: The store stayed open throughout the storm despite the power cuts.
questions.japanese: 停電にもかかわらず、その店は嵐の間ずっと営業していた。

questions.sentence: No one ___ Aya finished ___ ten minutes.
questions.completedSentence: No one except Aya finished within ten minutes.
questions.japanese: アヤ以外は誰も10分以内に終えなかった。

questions.sentence: He left ___ his coat ___ the cold.
questions.completedSentence: He left without his coat despite the cold.
questions.japanese: 彼は寒さにもかかわらず、コートなしで出かけた。

questions.sentence: The child climbed ___ the stage ___ a performer.
questions.completedSentence: The child climbed onto the stage like a performer.
questions.japanese: その子どもは演者のように舞台へ上がった。

questions.sentence: The leaves fell ___ the tree ___ the night.
questions.completedSentence: The leaves fell off the tree throughout the night.
questions.japanese: 葉は夜通し木から落ちた。

questions.sentence: The cat jumped ___ the chair and ___ the table.
questions.completedSentence: The cat jumped onto the chair and onto the table.
questions.japanese: 猫は椅子の上とテーブルの上へ飛び乗った。

questions.sentence: We walked ___ the gate ___ looking back.
questions.completedSentence: We walked toward the gate without looking back.
questions.japanese: 振り返らずに門の方へ歩いた。

questions.sentence: ___ the noise, she worked ___ the evening.
questions.completedSentence: despite the noise, she worked throughout the evening.
questions.japanese: 騒音にもかかわらず、彼女は夕方ずっと働いた。

questions.sentence: He served ___ captain ___ the tournament.
questions.completedSentence: He served as captain throughout the tournament.
questions.japanese: 彼は大会中ずっと主将を務めた。

questions.sentence: Everyone ___ Mika left ___ an umbrella.
questions.completedSentence: Everyone except Mika left without an umbrella.
questions.japanese: ミカ以外は全員、傘を持たずに出発した。

questions.sentence: The ball rolled ___ the desk ___ the carpet.
questions.completedSentence: The ball rolled off the desk onto the carpet.
questions.japanese: ボールは机からじゅうたんの上へ転がり落ちた。

questions.sentence: Please reply ___ two days ___ delay.
questions.completedSentence: Please reply within two days without delay.
questions.japanese: 遅れずに2日以内に返信すること。

questions.sentence: The fabric feels ___ silk ___ the day.
questions.completedSentence: The fabric feels like silk throughout the day.
questions.japanese: その布は一日中、絹のような感触である。

questions.sentence: The dog ran ___ its owner ___ the heavy rain.
questions.completedSentence: The dog ran toward its owner despite the heavy rain.
questions.japanese: 激しい雨にもかかわらず、犬は飼い主の方へ走った。

questions.sentence: She acted ___ host ___ her lack of experience.
questions.completedSentence: She acted as host despite her lack of experience.
questions.japanese: 経験不足にもかかわらず、彼女は司会役を務めた。

questions.sentence: The lights remained on ___ the night ___ the storm.
questions.completedSentence: The lights remained on throughout the night despite the storm.
questions.japanese: 嵐にもかかわらず、照明は夜通しついていた。

questions.sentence: All students ___ Ken arrived ___ ten minutes.
questions.completedSentence: All students except Ken arrived within ten minutes.
questions.japanese: ケン以外の学生は全員10分以内に到着した。

questions.sentence: She traveled ___ luggage ___ the inconvenience.
questions.completedSentence: She traveled without luggage despite the inconvenience.
questions.japanese: 不便にもかかわらず、彼女は荷物なしで旅行した。

questions.sentence: The actor stepped ___ the stage ___ a king.
questions.completedSentence: The actor stepped onto the stage like a king.
questions.japanese: 俳優は王のように舞台へ上がった。

questions.sentence: Water dripped ___ the roof ___ the storm.
questions.completedSentence: Water dripped off the roof throughout the storm.
questions.japanese: 嵐の間ずっと屋根から水が滴り落ちた。

questions.sentence: The child climbed ___ the sofa and ___ the bed.
questions.completedSentence: The child climbed onto the sofa and onto the bed.
questions.japanese: その子どもはソファーの上とベッドの上によじ登った。

questions.sentence: He walked ___ the door ___ speaking.
questions.completedSentence: He walked toward the door without speaking.
questions.japanese: 彼は何も言わずにドアの方へ歩いた。

questions.sentence: ___ the heat, they practiced ___ the afternoon.
questions.completedSentence: despite the heat, they practiced throughout the afternoon.
questions.japanese: 暑さにもかかわらず、彼らは午後ずっと練習した。

questions.sentence: She worked ___ an assistant ___ the project.
questions.completedSentence: She worked as an assistant throughout the project.
questions.japanese: 彼女はプロジェクト中ずっと助手として働いた。

questions.sentence: Everyone ___ Taro completed it ___ extra time.
questions.completedSentence: Everyone except Taro completed it without extra time.
questions.japanese: タロウ以外は全員、追加時間なしで終えた。

questions.sentence: The book fell ___ the shelf ___ the floor.
questions.completedSentence: The book fell off the shelf onto the floor.
questions.japanese: 本は棚から床へ落ちた。

questions.sentence: We reached the station ___ twenty minutes ___ a map.
questions.completedSentence: We reached the station within twenty minutes without a map.
questions.japanese: 地図なしで20分以内に駅へ着いた。

questions.sentence: The sound was ___ thunder ___ the night.
questions.completedSentence: The sound was like thunder throughout the night.
questions.japanese: その音は夜通し雷のようだった。

questions.sentence: The crowd moved ___ the gate ___ the rain.
questions.completedSentence: The crowd moved toward the gate despite the rain.
questions.japanese: 雨にもかかわらず、人々は門の方へ進んだ。

questions.sentence: He answered ___ spokesperson ___ the pressure.
questions.completedSentence: He answered as spokesperson despite the pressure.
questions.japanese: 重圧にもかかわらず、彼は広報担当者として答えた。

questions.sentence: The team stayed calm ___ the match ___ the injuries.
questions.completedSentence: The team stayed calm throughout the match despite the injuries.
questions.japanese: けがにもかかわらず、チームは試合中ずっと落ち着いていた。

questions.sentence: No one ___ the captain returned ___ an hour.
questions.completedSentence: No one except the captain returned within an hour.
questions.japanese: 主将以外は誰も1時間以内に戻らなかった。

questions.sentence: He entered ___ permission ___ the warning.
questions.completedSentence: He entered without permission despite the warning.
questions.japanese: 警告にもかかわらず、彼は許可なしで入った。

questions.sentence: The dancer stepped ___ the platform ___ a professional.
questions.completedSentence: The dancer stepped onto the platform like a professional.
questions.japanese: ダンサーはプロのように台の上へ上がった。

questions.sentence: Snow slid ___ the roof ___ the morning.
questions.completedSentence: Snow slid off the roof throughout the morning.
questions.japanese: 雪は午前中ずっと屋根から滑り落ちた。

questions.sentence: The cat leaped ___ the sofa and ___ the chair.
questions.completedSentence: The cat leaped onto the sofa and onto the chair.
questions.japanese: 猫はソファーの上と椅子の上へ飛び乗った。

questions.sentence: She moved ___ the window ___ making a sound.
questions.completedSentence: She moved toward the window without making a sound.
questions.japanese: 彼女は音を立てずに窓の方へ動いた。

questions.sentence: ___ the delay, the train ran ___ the night.
questions.completedSentence: despite the delay, the train ran throughout the night.
questions.japanese: 遅れにもかかわらず、列車は夜通し走った。

questions.sentence: He worked ___ a volunteer ___ the event.
questions.completedSentence: He worked as a volunteer throughout the event.
questions.japanese: 彼は行事中ずっとボランティアとして働いた。

questions.sentence: Everyone ___ Emi finished ___ help.
questions.completedSentence: Everyone except Emi finished without help.
questions.japanese: エミ以外は全員、助けなしで終えた。

questions.sentence: The phone slipped ___ the desk ___ the rug.
questions.completedSentence: The phone slipped off the desk onto the rug.
questions.japanese: 携帯電話は机から敷物の上へ滑り落ちた。

questions.sentence: Finish the form ___ fifteen minutes ___ mistakes.
questions.completedSentence: Finish the form within fifteen minutes without mistakes.
questions.japanese: 間違えずに15分以内に用紙を完成させること。

questions.sentence: The child danced ___ a star ___ the show.
questions.completedSentence: The child danced like a star throughout the show.
questions.japanese: その子どもは公演中ずっとスターのように踊った。

questions.sentence: We drove ___ the coast ___ the fog.
questions.completedSentence: We drove toward the coast despite the fog.
questions.japanese: 霧にもかかわらず、海岸の方へ車で進んだ。

questions.sentence: She spoke ___ class representative ___ her fear.
questions.completedSentence: She spoke as class representative despite her fear.
questions.japanese: 恐れにもかかわらず、彼女はクラス代表として話した。

questions.sentence: Music continued ___ the ceremony ___ the power problem.
questions.completedSentence: Music continued throughout the ceremony despite the power problem.
questions.japanese: 電源の問題にもかかわらず、式典中ずっと音楽が流れた。

questions.sentence: All teams ___ ours arrived ___ thirty minutes.
questions.completedSentence: All teams except ours arrived within thirty minutes.
questions.japanese: 私たちのチーム以外はすべて30分以内に到着した。

questions.sentence: He traveled ___ a ticket ___ the risk.
questions.completedSentence: He traveled without a ticket despite the risk.
questions.japanese: 危険にもかかわらず、彼は切符なしで移動した。

questions.sentence: The paper floated ___ the floor ___ a leaf.
questions.completedSentence: The paper floated onto the floor like a leaf.
questions.japanese: 紙は葉のように床の上へ舞い降りた。

questions.sentence: Rainwater ran ___ the roof ___ the evening.
questions.completedSentence: Rainwater ran off the roof throughout the evening.
questions.japanese: 雨水は夕方ずっと屋根から流れ落ちた。

questions.sentence: The child jumped ___ the bed and ___ the chair.
questions.completedSentence: The child jumped onto the bed and onto the chair.
questions.japanese: その子どもはベッドの上と椅子の上へ飛び乗った。

questions.sentence: They walked ___ the lights ___ the darkness.
questions.completedSentence: They walked toward the lights despite the darkness.
questions.japanese: 暗闇にもかかわらず、彼らは明かりの方へ歩いた。
